features: Listerine is the 1# mouthwash brand in the UK & Ireland*. Listerine Advanced Defence Gum Treatment Mouthwash is clinically proven to treat gum disease and prevent it from recurring
To treat gingivitis: Bleeding gums can be a sign of gingivitis, an inflammation of the gums caused by plaque bacteria sticking to your gums
Invisible protective shield: The oral dental care rinse prevents plaque germs from attaching to the gums, allowing gums to repair and restore themselves to a natural healthier state
How to use: Use the Listerine mouthwash twice daily, morning and evening after brushing. Pour 20ml (4 x 5ml teaspoons) into a glass, rinse for 30 seconds, then spit out
Product details: Listerine Advanced Defence Gum Treatment Mouthwash (500ml), clinically proven to treat and prevent gum disease and gingivitis, caring mouthwash for defending gums
description: Product Description Listerine Advanced Defence Gum Treatment Mouthwash (500ml) - Treats Gum Disease and Gingivitis Listerine Advanced Defence Gum Treatment is a clinically proven mouthwash for gum disease treatment and helps achieve healthier gums in as little as two weeks. This innovative formula establishes an invisible protective shield that repels plaque germs from attaching to your gums, allowing gums to repair and restore themselves to their natural state. How to use: Use this Listerine mouthwash twice daily after brushing or when directed by your dental healthcare professional. Rinse your mouth thoroughly with water then pour 20 ml (4 x 5 ml teaspoonfuls) into a glass, rinse around teeth and gums for 30 seconds, then spit out. Product Benefits at a Glance: Clinically-proven mouthwash for gum disease treatment Creates an invisible protective shield Crisp mint flavour 1x 500ml UK disclaimer - *Source ©2023 NIQ data, Value & Units, Total Mouthwash Category (client defined) 52 w/e 28.10.23 (United Kingdom) IE disclaimer - *Kenvue calculation based on data reported by Nielsen through its Retail Index Service for the Mouthwash Category (Kenvue defined) for the 52-week period ending 27.08.23, for the Irish market. (Copyright © 2019, The Nielsen Company) Ingredients [PR-012125] Ethyl Lauroyl Arginate HCI (LAE) 0.147% w/w. Other ingredients: Purified Water, Sorbitol, Alcohol, Glycerin, Poloxamer 407, Aroma, Benzoic Acid, Sucralose, Sodium Benzoate. Directions Use this product 2 times a day after brushing your teeth by applying 20 ml (approx. 4 teaspoons) for 30 seconds. Safety Warning Keep out of sight and reach of children. Do not use this product if sensitive or allergic to ethyllauroyl arginate HCl is an ingredient. If discomfort feels irritation, stop using the product. A significant amount (more than 20 ml) is swallowed, drink a cup of water contact your doctor emergency department. Not suitable for children under 12 years. use, container is damaged is tampered with the tamper-proof closure. dilute, swallow from bottle. Do not use after the expiration date. Only as indicated to suffer from gum disease are sure whether it is gum disease, then use it. This can also be used to prevent gum inflammation where there are no symptoms.
